symptom_description: High discharge temperature trip (`> 113°C`) activated. Air blowing back through intake air filter assembly during unloader cycle (`10.3 PSI`).
root_cause: Carbon deposit buildup (`0.16 inch` thick) on valve seat caused by oil carryover (`72 ppm`) and high operating temperatures (`99`°C).
action_taken: Disassembled valve pockets, cleaned carbon buildup using chemical solvent (`24 ppm` cleared), and installed new reed valve rebuild kits (`Spec-284`).
parts_used: Valve Rebuild Kit (Plates, Springs, Seats), High-Temp Head Gaskets

symptom_description: Loud localized metallic clicking and cavitation crackling inside compressor cylinder head during compression stroke. Capacity down by `moderate` (`31%` drop). Inspected power and control interconnects running to DRYER-202 during diagnostic routine.
root_cause: Corrosive chemical vapor (`pH 6.3`) drawn through intake air stream pitted stainless reed valves during `24581` hours of runtime.
action_taken: Swapped out stage 1 and 2 valve packs (`Spec-375`), replaced O-ring seals (`Spec-838`), and verified volumetric efficiency (`+62%` flow).
parts_used: Suction Valve Pack Stage 1, Discharge Valve Pack Stage 2, Gasket Kit

symptom_description: Compressor unable to build discharge pressure above `29` PSI (`target 32 PSI`). High interstage temperature (`100`°C) on stage 1 cylinder. Maintenance triggered after unusual process flow/pressure drop noted on primary process unit DRYER-202.
root_cause: Ingestion of particulate grit (`155 ppm` concentration) through torn air intake filter element (`60-mesh`) eroded suction valve sealing face.
action_taken: Installed new valve plates, springs, and seats (`Spec-922`); torqued head bolts to factory specification (`96 ft-lbs`) and tested capacity (`44 PSI`).
parts_used: Reed Valve Replacement Pack, Valve Cover O-Ring Set, Fastener Kit

symptom_description: Compressor cabinet temperature high (`100`°C). Discharge air temp exceeding `142`°C with heavy heat radiation from cooler core.
root_cause: Cooling fan blade angle distortion (`0.008 inch` runout) reduced airflow velocity across heat exchanger matrix by `41%`.
action_taken: Replaced cooling fan assembly (`Spec-708`), straightened bent cooler fins (`0.004 gap`), and verified temperature differential (`97`°C delta).
parts_used: Replacement Cooling Fan Blade, Fin Comb Tool, Cooler Hardware

symptom_description: Oil sampling revealed `32 ppm` moisture content (`cloudy emulsion`). Discharge air carryover exceeding `453 ppm` oil concentration downstream.
root_cause: Air/oil separator element rupture (`0.15 inch` tear) caused by differential pressure spikes (`> 44 PSI`) during rapid load/unload cycling.
action_taken: Installed upgraded coalescence separator element (`Spec-192`), drained emulsified oil (`86 lbs`), flushed sump, and verified `< 2 ppm` carryover.
parts_used: Coalescing Air/Oil Separator, Synthetic PAO Oil (10 Gal), Flushing Solvent

symptom_description: Compressor speed dropping during load cycle (`60%` slip). Severe rumbling audible near drive sheave with gradual burnt rubber smell.
root_cause: Normal mechanical wear and stretching (`+0.17 inch` elongation) of V-belts after exceeding `32652` hours of continuous loading/unloading duty.
action_taken: Locked out unit, removed belt guard, replaced matched set of 4 V-belts (`Spec-294`), laser aligned sheaves (`0.018 gap`), and tensioned to sonic gauge spec (`19 Hz`).
parts_used: Matched Set of 4 V-Belts (VX-120), Sheave Bushing Kit

symptom_description: Thermal warning alarm active on compressor controller (`123`°C). Unit operating at `177` Amps with heavy heat buildup inside acoustic enclosure.
root_cause: Low oil level (`-43%` volume) in compressor sump due to gradual carryover past aging separator element over `35259` hours.
action_taken: Cleaned cooler core fins, adjusted cabinet ventilation louvers (`0.012 gap`), and verified discharge temperature stabilized at `81`°C under full load (`27 PSI`).
parts_used: Cabinet Ventilation Filter Pad, Oil Top-off Bottle, Louver Linkage

symptom_description: Belt tension sensor alarm (`< 139 ft-lbs` static tension). Visual inspection revealed cracked cogs (`47%` cracked) across matched V-belt set.
root_cause: Normal mechanical wear and stretching (`+0.06 inch` elongation) of V-belts after exceeding `20889` hours of continuous loading/unloading duty.
action_taken: Locked out unit, removed belt guard, replaced matched set of 4 V-belts (`P/N 8188-REV2`), laser aligned sheaves (`0.007 gap`), and tensioned to sonic gauge spec (`18 Hz`).
parts_used: Matched Set of 4 V-Belts (VX-120), Sheave Bushing Kit

symptom_description: Compressor speed dropping during load cycle (`32%` slip). Severe chattering audible near drive sheave with localized burnt rubber smell.
root_cause: Improper initial belt tensioning (`160 ft-lbs` loose) allowed slippage (`33%` slip) and frictional glazing during high torque starts (`77` Amps).
action_taken: Replaced worn drive belt set (`Spec-126`), realigned motor sheave using precision laser tool (`0.005 inch` tolerance), and re-tensioned after 24-hour run-in.
parts_used: Heavy Duty V-Belt Set (3-Pack), Solvent Cleaner (1 Can), Laser Target

symptom_description: Stage 2 intercooling pressure fluctuating (`41 PSI +/- 62%`). Severe acoustic impact (`hissing`) detected inside discharge valve pocket.
root_cause: Over-torquing of valve cover hold-down bolts (`49 ft-lbs`) warped valve seat assembly by `0.004 inch`, causing internal blow-by.
action_taken: Rebuilt concentric valve assemblies (`Spec-136`), honed valve seating pockets (`0.010 tolerance`), and verified interstage pressure (`16 PSI`).
parts_used: Concentric Valve Rebuild Kit, Valve Pocket O-Rings, Synthetic Lubricant

symptom_description: Belt tension sensor alarm (`< 84 ft-lbs` static tension). Visual inspection revealed cracked cogs (`21%` cracked) across matched V-belt set. Field diagnostics indicate misalignment at shaft coupling connecting directly to DRYER-202.
root_cause: Thermal degradation (`141`°C ambient inside guard) caused premature elastomer hardening and cross-cracking across belt ribs.
action_taken: Replaced drive belt set (`P/N 2897-X`), installed shaft seal repair kit (`Spec-289`) to stop oil drip, and tensioned belts to sonic frequency (`28 Hz`).
parts_used: Matched V-Belt Pack, Compressor Shaft Lip Seal, Belt Degreaser

symptom_description: Oil sampling revealed `224 ppm` moisture content (`cloudy emulsion`). Discharge air carryover exceeding `113 ppm` oil concentration downstream.
root_cause: Mixing of incompatible lubricant brands (`polyglycol vs PAO`) during top-off by operations caused chemical precipitation and heavy foaming (`56%` volume increase).
action_taken: Drained contaminated fluid (`473 ppm` moisture), replaced thermostatic mixing valve element (`P/N 6831-B`), renewed filters, and filled with certified compressor lubricant (`P/N 1995-A`).
parts_used: Thermostatic Bypass Valve Element, Oil Filter Assembly, Separator Element, ISO VG 46 Lube

symptom_description: Compressor unable to build discharge pressure above `32` PSI (`target 17 PSI`). High interstage temperature (`98`°C) on stage 1 cylinder.
root_cause: Over-torquing of valve cover hold-down bolts (`109 ft-lbs`) warped valve seat assembly by `0.011 inch`, causing internal blow-by.
action_taken: Rebuilt concentric valve assemblies (`P/N 8721-C`), honed valve seating pockets (`0.005 tolerance`), and verified interstage pressure (`40 PSI`).
parts_used: Concentric Valve Rebuild Kit, Valve Pocket O-Rings, Synthetic Lubricant

symptom_description: Compressor speed dropping during load cycle (`71%` slip). Severe rumbling audible near drive sheave with gradual burnt rubber smell.
root_cause: Thermal degradation (`107`°C ambient inside guard) caused premature elastomer hardening and cross-cracking across belt ribs.
action_taken: Replaced drive belt set (`Spec-959`), installed shaft seal repair kit (`P/N 6950-B`) to stop oil drip, and tensioned belts to sonic frequency (`53 Hz`).
parts_used: Matched V-Belt Pack, Compressor Shaft Lip Seal, Belt Degreaser

symptom_description: High air discharge temperature trip (`103`°C) shut down compressor package. Oil cooler radiator feels persistent hot across all passes (`120`°C). Unit overdrawing current when DRYER-202 operates at peak capacity.
root_cause: Internal oil cooler passages partially plugged with oil varnish deposits (`0.17 inch` layer), reducing heat transfer efficiency by `30%`.
action_taken: Circulated chemical descaling/de-varnishing agent (`Spec-507`) through internal cooler passages, flushed system (`332 GPM`), and replaced oil filter (`P/N 1147-X`).
parts_used: De-Varnishing Chemical Flush (5 Gal), Spin-On Oil Filter, Cooler Gasket Kit
